ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.
text: Se k…õ je piani ngml…õ ny…îngma k…õ eny…î k…õ ya su ngml…õ et…õ …î, diblii wo ng…õ zugba a tsuo n…î.
translated: The chief's daughter is beautiful and her mother is also beautiful, but the daughter's beauty surpasses her mother's, just like the moon surpasses the star.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Jeha n…õ …î ben…õ Herode na kaa ni leli …îm…õ sisi l…õ …î, e muklii mi fu waw…õ…õ, n…õ e ts…î a ya gbe joku…õ nyumuwi tsuo n…õ ng…õ Betlehem k…õ lej…õ …î ni …îm…õ a mi tsuo, nin…õm…õ n…õ ye jeha eny…î k…õ nin…õm…õ n…õ yi ja ng…õ be n…õ e bi ni leli …îm…õ fitsofitso …î nya.
translated: At that time King Herod heard this and was very disturbed, and all Jerusalem with him, and he gathered all the chief priests and scribes of the people and asked them where the Christ was to be born, they told him, in Bethlehem of Judea, for so it is written by the prophet.

ref: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
text: Se i ng…õ ny…õ dee ke: Salmo k…õ e nyami …î tsuo tete mia we kaa en…õ …îm…õ a kp…õti kake.
translated: The Bible says: The Psalmist says he will lift up his eyes to the hills from where his help comes.

ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he n…î n…õ e de m…õ ke: ‚ÄúYi n…î bi yayahi k…õ gba pu…õli ng…õ okadi hlae; se a be m…õ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbal…î Yona okadi …î.
translated: For just as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the great fish, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.

translated: Today, I will go to the river and my mother will give me some of the fish she caught yesterday.

ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.
text: Se k…õ je piani ngml…õ ny…îngma k…õ eny…î k…õ ya su ngml…õ et…õ …î, diblii wo ng…õ zugba a tsuo n…î.
translated: The chief's daughter is beautiful and her mother is also beautiful, but the daughter's beauty surpasses her mother's, just like the moon surpasses the star.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Jeha n…õ …î ben…õ Herode na kaa ni leli …îm…õ sisi l…õ …î, e muklii mi fu waw…õ…õ, n…õ e ts…î a ya gbe joku…õ nyumuwi tsuo n…õ ng…õ Betlehem k…õ lej…õ …î ni …îm…õ a mi tsuo, nin…õm…õ n…õ ye jeha eny…î k…õ nin…õm…õ n…õ yi ja ng…õ be n…õ e bi ni leli …îm…õ fitsofitso …î nya.
translated: At that time King Herod heard this and was very disturbed, and all Jerusalem with him; and when he had gathered all the chief priests and scribes of the people together, he inquired of them where the Christ was to be born, and they said to him, "In Bethlehem of Judea; for this is what has been written by the prophet."

ref: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
text: Se i ng…õ ny…õ dee ke: Salmo k…õ e nyami …î tsuo tete mia we kaa en…õ …îm…õ a kp…õti kake.
translated: The Bible says: The Psalmist says my God you are my rock where I will hide and you will lift me up.

ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he n…î n…õ e de m…õ ke: ‚ÄúYi n…î bi yayahi k…õ gba pu…õli ng…õ okadi hlae; se a be m…õ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbal…î Yona okadi …î.
translated: For just as Jonah was three days and three nights in the belly of the great fish, so will the Son of Man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth.
